spots.name: George Town Heritage Zone
spots.shortDescription: A UNESCO-listed port city of colourful shophouses, clan houses, temples and celebrated street food.
spots.whyVisit: Living heritage, mural walks, Peranakan culture and Malaysia’s most famous food scene.
spots.openingHours: Historic streets are always accessible; sites vary
spots.entranceFee: Public streets free; museums and mansions ticketed
spots.topActivities: Street-art walk, food tour, clan jetties, museum visits
spots.nearbyAttractions: Cheong Fatt Tze Mansion, Kek Lok Si Temple
spots.travelTips: Walk early or late for cooler weather and use a map to find murals beyond the busiest lanes.
spots.chineseShortDescription: 联合国教科文组织世界遗产城区，汇集华人店屋、街头艺术、宗教建筑与多元美食。

spots.name: Melaka Historic City
spots.shortDescription: A UNESCO-recognised Straits trading city shaped by Malay, Chinese, Portuguese, Dutch and British heritage.
spots.whyVisit: Riverside walks, Peranakan culture, historic squares and night-market snacks.
spots.openingHours: Historic district accessible daily; individual sites vary
spots.topActivities: Jonker Walk, river cruise, Stadthuys, Peranakan food
spots.travelTips: Visit Jonker Street on a weekend evening for the night market, but expect crowds.
spots.chineseShortDescription: 拥有荷兰、葡萄牙与娘惹文化痕迹的河畔古城，也是联合国教科文组织世界遗产地。

spots.name: Langkawi UNESCO Global Geopark
spots.shortDescription: An island archipelago of beaches, mangroves, limestone formations and rainforest landscapes.
spots.whyVisit: Island-hopping, cable-car views, mangrove tours and relaxed beach time.
spots.entranceFee: Island access free; tours and cable car ticketed
spots.topActivities: SkyCab, Kilim mangrove tour, beach hopping
spots.travelTips: Book boat tours with licensed operators and plan outdoor activities before afternoon rain.
spots.chineseName: 浮罗交怡联合国教科文组织世界地质公园
spots.chineseLocation: 吉打浮罗交怡，马来西亚
spots.chineseShortDescription: 由雨林、红树林、石灰岩地貌和安达曼海岛屿组成的热带地质公园。

spots.name: Batu Caves
spots.shortDescription: A dramatic limestone cave complex with Hindu shrines and the towering golden Murugan statue.
spots.whyVisit: Temple culture, colourful steps and one of Kuala Lumpur’s most memorable landmarks.
spots.entranceFee: Main cave access generally free; some caves ticketed
spots.topActivities: Temple visit, stair climb, cave photography
spots.travelTips: Dress modestly, watch for monkeys and bring water for the stairs.
spots.chineseShortDescription: 石灰岩山洞中的印度教圣地，以彩色阶梯和巨大的室建陀神像闻名。

spots.name: Petronas Twin Towers
spots.shortDescription: The twin towers define Kuala Lumpur’s skyline with an elegant steel-and-glass design.
spots.whyVisit: Skybridge views, observation deck and the surrounding KLCC district.
spots.travelTips: Reserve timed entry online, especially on weekends.
spots.mapQuery: Petronas Twin Towers, Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia
spots.chineseShortDescription: 吉隆坡最具代表性的摩天大楼，以伊斯兰几何元素与空中桥梁设计著称。
